assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 (lines 80-84) explicitly shows: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205'. The plan also states 'This task targets a feature branch (TC-9005), not main.' (line 76). TC-9005 is checked out before creating the task branch, and 'main' is not used.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 (line 180) shows: 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --title "feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table"'. The PR targets TC-9005, not main. Line 191 also explicitly notes: 'The PR targets --base TC-9005 (the feature branch), NOT main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 (line 84) shows 'git checkout -b TC-9205' creating the task branch. Step 10 (line 179) shows 'git push -u origin TC-9205'. Line 192 explicitly states: 'The task branch is named TC-9205 (the task issue ID)'. The task branch TC-9205 is clearly distinct from the target branch TC-9005.

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 4 'Understand the Code' (lines 48-51) explicitly lists all three files: '1. migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- sibling migration, understand the MigrationTrait implementation pattern', '2. migration/src/lib.rs -- understand how migrations are registered', '3. entity/src/advisory.rs -- verify the entity no longer references the status column'. This step occurs before Step 6 (implementation).

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 (line 166) shows the commit command: 'git commit --trailer=\'Assisted-by: Claude Code\' -m "feat(migration): ..."'. Line 193 also explicitly notes: 'The commit includes --trailer=\'Assisted-by: Claude Code\''.

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 (lines 152-160) shows the commit message: 'feat(migration): drop deprecated status column from advisory table' (Conventional Commits format with type 'feat', scope 'migration', and description). The footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID. Both format requirements are met.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 (line 19) explicitly extracts: '**Target Branch**: TC-9005 (a feature branch, NOT main)'. Step 5 (line 76) reaffirms: 'This task targets a feature branch (TC-9005), not main.' The target branch is clearly identified and extracted from the task description as a parsed field.
